entries.name: Customer Value is Paramount
entries.essence: Creating genuine customer value is the foundation of sustainable business

entries.name: Solve Real Problems
entries.essence: Focus on solving actual customer problems, not imagined ones

entries.name: Customer Success Equals Our Success
entries.essence: Business thrives when customers achieve their desired outcomes

entries.name: Long-Term Relationships Over Transactions
entries.essence: Prioritize building lasting customer relationships over one-time sales

entries.name: Listen to Customer Feedback
entries.essence: Customer input is invaluable for product and service improvement

entries.name: Earn Customer Trust
entries.essence: Trust is earned through consistent delivery and integrity

entries.name: Delight, Don't Just Satisfy
entries.essence: Exceeding expectations creates memorable experiences and loyalty

entries.name: Customer Retention is Cheaper Than Acquisition
entries.essence: Keeping existing customers is more cost-effective than finding new ones

entries.name: Measure Value Delivered, Not Features Shipped
entries.essence: Success is measured by customer outcomes, not output volume

entries.name: Make It Easy for Customers
entries.essence: Reduce friction and complexity in all customer interactions

entries.name: Integrity is Non-Negotiable
entries.essence: Ethical behavior and honesty are fundamental requirements, not options

entries.name: Transparency Builds Trust
entries.essence: Open, honest communication strengthens all relationships

entries.name: Keep Commitments
entries.essence: Deliver on promises and own up to failures

entries.name: Ethical Shortcuts Don't Exist
entries.essence: There is no ethical way to achieve unethical ends

entries.name: Admit Mistakes Quickly
entries.essence: Acknowledge errors promptly and take corrective action

entries.name: Treat All Stakeholders Fairly
entries.essence: Balance interests of customers, employees, investors, and community

entries.name: Compliance is Minimum, Not Maximum
entries.essence: Legal compliance is baseline; ethical behavior goes beyond

entries.name: Protect Customer Data
entries.essence: Customer privacy and data security are sacred responsibilities

entries.name: No Retaliation for Speaking Up
entries.essence: Encourage reporting of issues without fear of punishment

entries.name: Reputation Takes Years to Build, Moments to Destroy
entries.essence: Protect reputation through consistent ethical behavior

entries.name: Execution Beats Ideas
entries.essence: Great execution of good ideas trumps poor execution of great ideas

entries.name: Speed Matters
entries.essence: Velocity creates competitive advantage and learning opportunities

entries.name: Done is Better Than Perfect
entries.essence: Shipping imperfect work enables iteration and learning

entries.name: Measure What Matters
entries.essence: Track metrics that actually drive business outcomes

entries.name: Focus is a Competitive Advantage
entries.essence: Doing few things well beats doing many things poorly

entries.name: Quality Compounds
entries.essence: Consistent quality builds reputation and customer loyalty over time

entries.name: Bias Toward Action
entries.essence: When uncertain, take action and learn rather than endlessly deliberating

entries.name: Simplicity Scales
entries.essence: Simple solutions are easier to execute, maintain, and scale

entries.name: Accountability Drives Results
entries.essence: Clear ownership and responsibility produce better outcomes

entries.name: Process Serves Purpose
entries.essence: Processes should enable work, not become work themselves

entries.name: People are the Business
entries.essence: Talent and culture determine long-term success more than strategy

entries.name: Hire for Culture Add, Not Culture Fit
entries.essence: Seek people who enhance culture while sharing core values

entries.name: Invest in Employee Growth
entries.essence: Developing people creates value for them and the business

entries.name: Psychological Safety Enables Performance
entries.essence: People perform best when they feel safe to take risks and be vulnerable

entries.name: Diversity Strengthens Teams
entries.essence: Diverse perspectives lead to better decisions and innovation

entries.name: Fair Compensation Reflects Value
entries.essence: Pay people fairly based on the value they create

entries.name: Feedback is a Gift
entries.essence: Honest feedback, given with care, helps people grow

entries.name: Recognition Motivates
entries.essence: Acknowledging contributions fuels engagement and morale

entries.name: Leaders Serve Teams
entries.essence: Leadership exists to enable and support others' success

entries.name: Toxic Behavior Cannot Be Tolerated
entries.essence: No talent justifies keeping people who damage culture

entries.name: Cash is King
entries.essence: Cash flow and liquidity are essential for business survival

entries.name: Profitability Matters
entries.essence: Sustainable businesses must generate more value than they consume

entries.name: Unit Economics Must Work
entries.essence: Contribution margin at the unit level determines viability at scale

entries.name: Understand Your Numbers
entries.essence: Financial literacy and awareness are required at all levels

entries.name: Invest for Return
entries.essence: Every dollar deployed should generate measurable returns

entries.name: Manage Risk Intelligently
entries.essence: Take calculated risks; avoid betting the company unnecessarily

entries.name: Maintain Financial Runway
entries.essence: Preserve enough cash to weather downturns and seize opportunities

entries.name: Capital Efficiency Creates Options
entries.essence: Doing more with less preserves resources and flexibility

entries.name: Revenue Quality Matters
entries.essence: Predictable, recurring revenue is more valuable than one-time sales

entries.name: Cost Control Enables Investment
entries.essence: Managing costs well frees resources for growth initiatives

entries.name: Innovation is Survival
entries.essence: Businesses must innovate continuously or become obsolete

entries.name: Experiment and Learn
entries.essence: Testing hypotheses rapidly accelerates learning and improvement

entries.name: Failure is Data
entries.essence: Failed experiments provide valuable information if learned from

entries.name: Challenge Assumptions
entries.essence: Questioning conventional wisdom opens new possibilities

entries.name: Stay Curious
entries.essence: Intellectual curiosity drives discovery and innovation

entries.name: Learn from Others
entries.essence: Study successes and failures across industries for insights

entries.name: Embrace Change
entries.essence: Adaptability is essential in dynamic environments

entries.name: Technology Enables, Strategy Directs
entries.essence: Use technology to amplify strategy, not dictate it

entries.name: Balance Core and Explore
entries.essence: Maintain existing business while exploring new opportunities

entries.name: Question Success
entries.essence: Even successful approaches should be continuously examined

entries.name: Differentiation is Essential
entries.essence: Clear differentiation is required for sustainable competitive advantage

entries.name: Build Defensibility
entries.essence: Create barriers that protect your position from competitors

entries.name: Compete on Value, Not Just Price
entries.essence: Price competition erodes margins; compete on unique value instead

entries.name: Know Your Competition
entries.essence: Understanding competitors enables better strategic decisions

entries.name: Choose Your Battles
entries.essence: Win where you have advantages; avoid unfavorable competitive arenas

entries.name: Network Effects Create Moats
entries.essence: Products that improve with more users build powerful advantages

entries.name: Speed Can Trump Resources
entries.essence: Moving faster can overcome disadvantages in size or capital

entries.name: Reputation is a Competitive Asset
entries.essence: Strong reputation attracts customers, talent, and partners

entries.name: Winner Often Takes Most
entries.essence: In many markets, market leaders capture disproportionate value

entries.name: Compete and Cooperate Strategically
entries.essence: Sometimes cooperation with competitors creates more value than pure competition

entries.name: Strategy Requires Choices
entries.essence: Real strategy means saying no to good opportunities

entries.name: Think Long-Term
entries.essence: Optimize for sustainable value over short-term gains

entries.name: Align Strategy and Execution
entries.essence: Strategy without execution is wishful thinking

entries.name: Adapt Strategy to Reality
entries.essence: Be willing to pivot when facts change or assumptions prove wrong

entries.name: Position for the Future
entries.essence: Build capabilities and positions for where the market is going

entries.name: Strategic Patience with Tactical Urgency
entries.essence: Patient on vision, impatient on execution and learning

entries.name: Concentrate Resources
entries.essence: Focus resources on critical battles rather than spreading thin

entries.name: Understand Market Dynamics
entries.essence: Industry structure and trends shape competitive possibilities

entries.name: Build Optionality
entries.essence: Preserve flexibility to respond to future opportunities

entries.name: Strategy is Hypothesis
entries.essence: Test strategic assumptions and update based on evidence

entries.name: Consistency Builds Trust
entries.essence: Reliable, consistent delivery creates confidence and loyalty

entries.name: Systems Beat Heroics
entries.essence: Scalable systems are more sustainable than individual heroics

entries.name: Eliminate Waste
entries.essence: Non-value-adding activities drain resources and slow progress

entries.name: Continuous Improvement
entries.essence: Small, consistent improvements compound into major gains

entries.name: Standardize to Scale
entries.essence: Standardization enables efficient scaling and quality control

entries.name: Optimize the Whole, Not Parts
entries.essence: System-level optimization beats local optimization

entries.name: Build Redundancy for Critical Functions
entries.essence: Accept some inefficiency to ensure reliability and resilience

entries.name: Automate Repetitive Work
entries.essence: Free people for high-value work by automating routine tasks

entries.name: Plan for Scale
entries.essence: Design operations to handle 10x growth from day one

entries.name: Fix Root Causes
entries.essence: Address underlying issues, not just symptoms

entries.name: Make Reversible Decisions Quickly
entries.essence: Speed matters more than perfection on decisions that can be undone

entries.name: Data Informs, Judgment Decides
entries.essence: Use data to inform decisions, but don't abdicate judgment to metrics

entries.name: Disagree and Commit
entries.essence: Once decisions are made, everyone commits fully regardless of initial position

entries.name: Seek Diverse Perspectives
entries.essence: Better decisions emerge from considering multiple viewpoints

entries.name: Consider Second-Order Effects
entries.essence: Think through consequences of consequences, not just immediate impacts

entries.name: Acknowledge Uncertainty
entries.essence: Be explicit about what is known, unknown, and unknowable

entries.name: Optimize for Expected Value
entries.essence: Make decisions that maximize expected outcomes over time

entries.name: Learn from Outcomes
entries.essence: Review decision outcomes to improve future decision-making

entries.name: Decide at the Right Level
entries.essence: Push decisions to those closest to information and impact

entries.name: Act on Conviction, Not Consensus
entries.essence: Seek input widely, but don't require unanimous agreement to act
